'''holadaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:xiphiplastral|xiphiplastral]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-l-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xiphiplastral|xiphiplastral]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| holadaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:holadithi|holadithi]] || [[word:holadiji|holadiji]] || [[word:holadishi|holadishi]] || [[word:holadiki|holadiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:holaduthuthu|holaduthuthu]] || [[word:holadujuju|holadujuju]] || [[word:holadushushu|holadushushu]] || [[word:holadukuku|holadukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:holaduthu|holaduthu]] || [[word:holaduju|holaduju]] || [[word:holadushu|holadushu]] || [[word:holaduku|holaduku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:holadufthuf|holadufthuf]] || [[word:holadufjuf|holadufjuf]] || [[word:holadufshuf|holadufshuf]] || [[word:holadufkuf|holadufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:holadethe|holadethe]] || [[word:holadeje|holadeje]] || [[word:holadeshe|holadeshe]] || [[word:holadeke|holadeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:holadothotho|holadothotho]] || [[word:holadojojo|holadojojo]] || [[word:holadoshosho|holadoshosho]] || [[word:holadokoko|holadokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:holadotho|holadotho]] || [[word:holadojo|holadojo]] || [[word:holadosho|holadosho]] || [[word:holadoko|holadoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:holadofthof|holadofthof]] || [[word:holadofjof|holadofjof]] || [[word:holadofshof|holadofshof]] || [[word:holadofkof|holadofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:holadÃŸfthÃŸf|holadÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:holadÃŸfjÃŸf|holadÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:holadÃŸfshÃŸf|holadÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:holadÃŸfkÃŸf|holadÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:holadÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|holadÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:holadÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|holadÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:holadÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|holadÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:holadÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|holadÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:holadÃŸfthÃŸf|holadÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:holadÃŸfjÃŸf|holadÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:holadÃŸfshÃŸf|holadÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:holadÃŸfkÃŸf|holadÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:holadÃŸfthÃŸf|holadÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:holadÃŸfjÃŸf|holadÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:holadÃŸfshÃŸf|holadÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:holadÃŸfkÃŸf|holadÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:holadÃḊthÃḊ|holadÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:holadÃḊjÃḊ|holadÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:holadÃḊshÃḊ|holadÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:holadÃḊkÃḊ|holadÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:holadathatha|holadathatha]] || [[word:holadajaja|holadajaja]] || [[word:holadashasha|holadashasha]] || [[word:holadakaka|holadakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:holadatha|holadatha]] || [[word:holadaja|holadaja]] || [[word:holadasha|holadasha]] || [[word:holadaka|holadaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:holadafthaf|holadafthaf]] || [[word:holadafjaf|holadafjaf]] || [[word:holadafshaf|holadafshaf]] || [[word:holadafkaf|holadafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:holadasha|holadasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:holadshÃḋsha|holadshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:holadrosha|holadrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:holadmusha|holadmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:holadyasha|holadyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goholadnkshÃḋsha|goholadnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goholadnkrosha|goholadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goholadnkmusha|goholadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goholadnkyasha|goholadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:holaladasha|holaladasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:holaladshÃḋsha|holaladshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:holaladrosha|holaladrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:holaladmusha|holaladmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:holaladyasha|holaladyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goholaladnkshÃḋsha|goholaladnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goholaladnkrosha|goholaladnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goholaladnkmusha|goholaladnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goholaladnkyasha|goholaladnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:helÃḊdasha|helÃḊdasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:helÃḊdshÃḋsha|helÃḊdshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:helÃḊdrosha|helÃḊdrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:helÃḊdmusha|helÃḊdmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:helÃḊdyasha|helÃḊdyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohelÃḊdnkshÃḋsha|gohelÃḊdnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohelÃḊdnkrosha|gohelÃḊdnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohelÃḊdnkmusha|gohelÃḊdnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohelÃḊdnkyasha|gohelÃḊdnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:holfadasha|holfadasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:holfadshÃḋsha|holfadshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:holfadrosha|holfadrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:holfadmusha|holfadmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:holfadyasha|holfadyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goholfadnkshÃḋsha|goholfadnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goholfadnkrosha|goholfadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goholfadnkmusha|goholfadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goholfadnkyasha|goholfadnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
